title: Origins SMP
description: This Minecraft modpack incorporates Origins mod and powerful performance enhancing mods to enhance your multiplayer gaming experience.
body:
# Origins SMP

A lightweight Fabric 1.19.4 Minecraft modpack with multiplayer and performance in mind.

![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/9wFEA5Ye/images/6772292f92face38989199f2f3ff03f9adf2a2b2.png)

Together, the use of iris, sodium, starlight, and more, in Origins SMP results in a substantial improvement in the game's frame rate, allowing players to enjoy a more seamless and immersive gameplay experience.

## Essentials
The [Essentials Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) is a quality of life mod that allows users to host singleplayer worlds and invite friends, take, edit, and share screenshots in game, and message users directly in game.

## Up to date
Constantly updated to the latest version the mods support, you can enjoy all of the latest features and improvements without having to manually update each individual mod!

## Lightweight
this modpack runs on fabric, a lightweight mod launcher, meaning this modpack is a very smooth enjoyable experience, and is less likely to lag compared to other mod launchers.
